name: @zhop/ai-vision
description: Shared AI infra for the HexAstral matrix: Gemini Vision client (image -> text, VLM only) + a unified Cloudflare Workers AI text/chat router (Kimi/Qwen3/GLM) + R2 cache + Zod-retry envelope. Consumed by svc-feng (feng-shui) and svc-astro (physiognomy + all readings/chat). Single Gemini secret (VLM only), single text-routing policy, single retry + cache pattern.
